text_fr: qui  permettra a l'Ecole  de  subvenir a ses  propres besoins  le  plus  tot  possible;
text_en: which will enable the School to provide for its own needs as soon as possible;

items_fr: 3. Exfwime l' espoir que le Conseil  d'administration s'efforcera  de  resoudre  par  priorite  le  probleme  que posent  l'acquisition de  locaux  permanents  suffisants  et la  constitution  d'une dotation  pour  l'Ecole;

4. Prie egalement le  Secretaire general de mettre au point avec le Conseil d'administration un rapport appro› prie  entre  l'indemnite pour frais  d' etudes  versee  pour les  enfants  des  fonctionnaires  de  l'Organisation  des Nations  Unies  ayant  droit a cette  indemnite,  d'une part, et la structure des droits de  scolarite et le  regime des  bourses  speciales  et  bourses  d' etudes  de  l'Ecole, d'autre  part,  en  vue  de  reduire  le  plus  possible  le deficit  d'exploitation;

6. Autorise le Secretaire  general a continuer  de mettre a la  disposition  de  l'Ecole le  solde  du credit de 20000 dollars  ouvert pour  1961  en vue  d'avancer les plans  relatifs  aux  locaux  permanents  de  l'Ecole  ou, avec  l'assentiment prealable du Comite consultatif pour les  questions  administratives  et  budgetaires,  aux  fins enoncees au paragraphe 5 ci-dessus.
5. Decide de  verser a l'Ecole une  contribution  de 50 000 dollars pour aider a combler le deficit  d'exploi› tation prevu pour l'annee scolaire en cours;
items_en: 3. Exfwime the hope that the Board of Directors will endeavour to resolve the problem of the acquisition of sufficient permanent premises and the creation of an allocation for the School as a matter of priority;

4. Also requests the Secretary-General, together with the Governing Council, to develop a report in an appropriate manner, between the education grant for the children of United Nations officials entitled to this grant and the structure of school fees and the special scholarships and scholarships scheme of the School, with a view to reducing the operating deficit as much as possible;

6. Authorizes the Secretary General to continue to make available to the School the balance of the credit of $20,000 opened for 1961 in order to advance the plans relating to the permanent premises of the School or, with the prior consent of the Advisory Committee on Administrative and Budgetary Questions, for the purposes set out in paragraph 5 above.
5. Decides to make a contribution of $50,000 to the School to help fill the exploration deficit for the current school year;

text_fr: 1086• seance  pleniere, 20 decembre  1961.
text_en: 1086• plenary session, 20 December 1961.

text_fr: 1728  (XVI). Confirmation des nominations faites par le Secritalre general aux poetes devenus vacant&  au  Comite des placements
text_en: 1728 (XVI). Confirmation of the Appointments Made by the Secrital General to the Poetry Vacancies on the Investments Committee

text_fr: L' Assemblee  generale
text_en: The General Assembly

items_fr: 1. C Oflfirme la nomination  par le  Secretaire general de  M.  William  Fiske  Frazier,  de  M.  R.  McAllister Lloyd et de  M.  David  Rockefeller  comme  membres du Comite  des  placements  pour  une  periode  allant  de  la date de  la  presente resolution au  31  decembre  1964;

2. Confirme en outre la  nomination par le  Secretaire general  de  M.  Roger  de  Candolle  comme  membre  du Comite  des  placements  pour  une  periode  de  trois  ans, a compter  du  1er  janvier  1962.
items_en: 1. C Affirms the appointment by the Secretary General of Mr. William Fiske Frazier, Mr. R. McAllister Lloyd and Mr. David Rockefeller as members of the Investments Committee for a period from the date of this resolution to 31 December 1964;
2. Further confirms the appointment by the Secretary General of Mr. Roger de Candolle as a member of the Investments Committee for a period of three years, effective 1 January 1962.

text_fr: 1086• seance  pleniere, 20  decembre  1961.
text_en: 1086• plenary session, 20 December 1961.

text_fr: 1729  (XVI).  Rapport du Comite de negoclation des  foods  extra-budgetaires
text_en: 1729 (XVI). Report of the Committee on the Negotiation of Extra-budgetary Foods

text_fr: L' Assemblee generale,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Ayont examine le  rapport  du  Comite  de  negociation des fonds  extra-budgetaires 28 ,
text_en: Ayont examines the report of the Committee on the Negotiation of Extra-budgetary Funds 28 ,

items_fr: 1. Decide que, aussitot que possible apres l'ouverture de  chaque  session  ordinaire  de  I' Assemblee  generale, il  sera  reuni,  sous  la presidence  du  President  de  l' As› semblee, une Commission speciale composee de tous les membres de  l' Assemblee,  devant laquelle  seront annon› cees les  contributions volontaires aux programmes inte› ressant  les  refugies  pour  l'exercice suivant;

2. Decide d'inviter  les  Etats  membres  des  institu› tions  specialisees  qui  ne  sont  pas  eplement  Membres de  l'Organisation  des  Nations  Umes a assister  aux reunions de la Commission speciale en vue d'y annoncer leurs  contributions  aux  programmes  interessant  les refugies;
3. Prie le  Secretaire  general,  agissant  en  consul› tation  avec  les  chefs  des  secretariats  charges  des  pro› grammes extra-budgetaires:

a) De fixer chaque annee des dates appropriees pour les  reunions  de  la  Commission  speciale  et celles  de  la Conference  pour l'annonce des contributions  au  Foods special  et au  Programme  elargi  d'assistance technique, convoquees conformement a la  resolution  1091  A  (XI) de l'Assemblee generate, en date du 27 fevrier  1957,  et d'informer  les  membres  de  ces  dates  suffisamment a l'avance;
b) D'appeler chaque  annee  l'attention des  membres sur les besoins des programmes extra-budgetaires pour l'exercice suivant  et de  rechercher  leur  appui  pour ces programmes.
items_en: 1. Decides that, as soon as possible after the opening of each ordinary session of the General Assembly, a Special Committee shall be convened under the chairmanship of the President of the As›, composed of all the members of the Assembly, to which the voluntary contributions to the programmes involving refugees for the following financial year shall be paid;

2. Decides to invite the Member States of the specialized institutions which are not members of the Umes Organization to attend the meetings of the Special Commission with a view to announcing their contributions to the programmes of interest to refugees;
3. Requests the Secretary General, acting in consultation with the heads of the secretariats responsible for the extra-budgetary programmes:

(a) To set appropriate dates each year for the meetings of the Special Commission and the Conference for the Announcement of Contributions to the Foods Special and the Expanded Programme of Technical Assistance, convened in accordance with Assembly resolution 1091 A (XI) of 27 February 1957, and to inform members of those dates sufficiently in advance;
(b) To draw the attention of members each year to the needs of the extra-budgetary programmes for the following financial period and to seek their support for those programmes.

text_fr: 1730  (XVI). Amendement au Statut du penonnel de l'Organisation des Nations Unies
text_en: 1730 (XVI). Amendment to the Statute of the United Nations

text_fr: L' Assemblee generale,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Ayant examine les  rapports  du  Secretaire general 29 et du  Comite consultatif  pour les  questions administra› tives et budgetaires 80 concernant l'indemnite pour frais d'etudes,
text_en: Having considered the reports of the Secretary General 29 and of the Advisory Committee on Administrative and Budgetary Questions 80 concerning the grant for study expenses,

text_fr: Decide de  modifier, a compter  du  1e·  janvier  1962, !'article 3.2  du  Statut  du  personnel  de  }'Organisation des  Nations  U nies  en  rempla<;ant  la  deuxieme  phrase du premier alinea  dudit article  par  le  texte suivant :
text_en: Decides to amend, with effect from 1 January 1962, Article 3.2 of the Staff Regulations of the United Nations by replacing the second sentence of the first subparagraph of that Article with the following:

text_fr: "Le  montant  maximum  de  l'indemnite  est  de  600 dollars  par annee  scolaire  et par enfant."
text_en: "The maximum amount of the allowance is $600 per school year and per child."

text_fr: 1086•  seance  pleniere, 20  decembre 1961.
text_en: 1086• plenary session, 20 December 1961.

text_fr: 1731  (XVI).  Procedlll'N adminiatrativee et bud› getaires de  l'Organisation  des  Nations Unies
text_en: 1731 (XVI). United Nations administrative and budgetary procedlll'N

text_fr: L' Assemblee generale,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Reconnaissant qu'elle  a  besoin  d'un avis  juridique autorise  quant  aux obligations  des  Etats  Membres  en vertu  de  la  Charte  des  Nations  U nies  en  ce  qui  con› cerne  le  financement  des  operations  des  Nations Unies au  Congo  et  au  Moyen-Orient,
text_en: Recognizing the need for legal advice on the obligations of Member States under the Charter of the United Nations in relation to the financing of United Nations operations in the Congo and the Middle East,

items_fr: 1. Decide de.soumettre la question ci-apres a la Cour internationale  de  Justice  pour  qu'elle  donne  un  avis consultatif :
items_en: 1. Decides to refer the following question to the International Court of Justice for an advisory opinion:

text_fr: "Les depenses autorisees par les  resolutions de l' As› semt.lee  generate  1583  (XV)  et  1590  (XV)  du  20 decembre  1960,  1595  (XV)  du  3  avril  1961,  1619 (XV) du 21  avril  1961  et 1633  (XVI) du 30 octobre 1961,  relatives  aux operations  des  Nations  Unies au Congo  entreprises  en  execution  des  resolutions  du Conseil  de  securite  en  date  des  14  juillet 11 , 22 juillet 82 et 9 aotit  1960 88 et  des  21  fevrier 84 et 24  novembre  1961 811 , ainsi  que  des  resolutions  de l'Assemblee generale 1474  (ES-IV) du 20 septembre 1960,  1599  (XV),  1600  (XV)  et  1601  (XV)  du 15  avril  1961,  et les  depenses autorisees par les reso› lutions de l'Assemblee generale 1122  (XI) du 26 no-
text_en: "The expenditure authorized by the resolutions of the As› semt.lee generale 1583 (XV) and 1590 (XV) of 20 December 1960, 1595 (XV) of 3 April 1961, 1619 (XV) of 21 April 1961 and 1633 (XVI) of 30 October 1961 relating to United Nations operations in the Congo undertaken in implementation of Security Council resolutions of 14 July 11, 22 July 82 and 9 aotit 1960 88 and 21 February 84 and 24 November 1961 811 , as well as the resolutions of the General Assembly 1474 (ES-IV) of 20 September 1960, 1599 (XV), 1600 (XV) and 1601 (XV) of 15 April 1961, and the expenditure authorized by the resolutions of the General Assembly 1122 (XI) of 26 No.

text_fr: aa
text_en: aa

text_en: document S/4426.

text_en: 84 Jbid., seiaieme amr.le, Su; U January, flvritr and March 1961, document S/4741.

text_fr: 811 Ibid., SuJ,J,lhnent  d'octobe,  novembre el dlcembre  1961, document  S/5002.
text_en: 811 Ibid., SuJ,J,lhnt d'octobe, November-December 1961, document S/5002.

text_fr: vembre  1956,  1089  (XI)  du  21  decembre  1956, 1090  (XI)  du  27  fevrier  1957,  1151  (XII)  du  22 novembre  1957,  1204  (XII)  du  13  decembre  1957, 1337  (XIII) du  13  decembre  1958,  1441  (XIV)  du 5  decembre  1959  et  1575  (XV)  du  20  decembre 1960,  relatives aux operations de  Ja  Force d'urgence des  Nations Unies entreprises en execution  des reso› lutions  de  l'Assemblee  generale  997  (ES-I)  du  2 novembre  1956,  998  (ES-I) et 999  (ES-I) du 4  no› vembre  1956,  1000  (ES-I)  du  5  novembre  1956, 1001  (ES-I)  du 7 novembre  1956,  1121  (XI)  du 24  novembre  1956  et 1263  (XIII)  du  14  novembre 1958,  constituent-elles  des  "depenses  de  l'Organi› sation"  au  sens  du  paragraphe  2  de  1' Article  17  de la  Charte  des  Nations  U nies ?" ;
text_en: December 1956, 1089 (XI) of 21 December 1956, 1090 (XI) of 27 February 1957, 1151 (XII) of 22 November 1957, 1204 (XII) of 13 December 1957, 1337 (XIII) of 13 December 1958, 1441 (XIV) of 5 December 1959 and 1575 (XV) of 20 December 1960, relating to the operations of the United Nations Emergency Force in response to the meetings of the General Assembly 997 (ES-I) of 2 November 1956, 998 (ES-I) and 999 (ES-I) of 4 November 1956, 1000 (ES-I) of 5 November 1956, 1001 (ES-I) of 7 November 1956, 1121 (XI) of 24 November 1956 and 1263 (XIII) of 14 November 1958, are they "Organi expenditure" within the meaning of paragraph 2 of Article 17 of the Charter of the United Nations?";

items_fr: 2. Prie le  Secretaire  general,  conformement a l' Ar› ticle  65  du  Statut de  la  Cour  internationale  de  Justice, de  transmettre  la  presente  resolution  a la  Cour  et  d'y joindre  tout  document  pouvant  servir a elucider  la question.
items_en: 2. Requests the Secretary-General, in accordance with Article 65 of the Statute of the International Court of Justice, to transmit the present resolution to the Court and to attach to it any document that may serve to elucidate the matter.

text_fr: 1086• seance  pliniere, 20 decembre 1961.
text_en: 1086• pliniere meeting, 20 December 1961.

text_fr: 1732  (XVI).  Operations  des  NatioM  Uniee  au Congo:  previsions  de  depenses  et  finance› ment
text_en: 1732 (XVI). Operations of the United States of America in the Congo: expenditure forecasts and finance

text_fr: L' Assemblee generale,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Rappelant les  resolutions  du  Conseil  de  securite  des 14  juillet  1960 81 , 22  juillet  1960 32 , 9  aout  1960 88 , 21  fevrier  1961 84 et  24  novembre  1961 8 G, ainsi  que les resolutions 1474  (ES-IV), 1599 (XV), 1600 (XV), 1601  (XV), 1619 (XV) et 1633  (XVI) de l'Assemblee generale,  en  date des 20 septembre  1960,  15  avril  1961, 21  avril  1961  et 30 octobre  1961,
text_en: Recalling the Security Council Resolutions of 14 July 1960 81, 22 July 1960 32, 9 August 1960 88, 21 February 1961 84 and 24 November 1961 8 G, and General Assembly Resolutions 1474 (ES-IV), 1599 (XV), 1600 (XV), 1601 (XV), 1619 (XV) and 1633 (XVI) of 20 September 1960, 15 April 1961, 21 April 1961 and 30 October 1961,

text_fr: Ayant examine le  rapport  du  Secretaire general  sur les  depenses prevues au titre des operations des  Nations Unies au Congo  pour  1962 88 et  le  rapport  du  Comite consultatif  pour  Jes  questions  administratives  et  bud› getaires 87,
text_en: Having considered the report of the Secretary-General on United Nations operations in the Congo for 1962-88 and the report of the Advisory Committee on Administrative and Budgetary Questions 87,

text_fr: Tenant  compte du  fait  que  la 1ature  des  depenses extraordinaires  afferentes  aux  operations  des  Nations Unies  au  Congo  est  essentiellement  distincte  de  celle des depenses de !'Organisation inscrites au budget ordi› naire,  si  bien  qu'il faut  appliquer,  pour les  couvrir,  une procedure differente  de  celle  qui  est  appliquee  dans  le cas  dudit  budget,
text_en: Taking into account the fact that the 1st nature of extraordinary expenditure in respect of the operations of the United Nations in the Congo is essentially distinct from that of the expenditure of the Organization included in the regular budget, so that a different procedure must be applied to cover such expenditure than that applied in the case of the said budget,

text_fr: Considerant que Jes  membres  permanents  du  Conseil de  securite  ont  une  responsabilite  Speciale  touchant  le maintien de  la  paix et de  la  securite  internationales  et, en consequence,  le  financement  des  operations  relatives a la  paix et a la  securite,
text_en: Recognizing that my permanent members of the Security Council have a special responsibility for the maintenance of international peace and security and, as a result, the financing of peace and security operations,

items_fr: 1. Decide de  maintenir  le  compte ad  hoe pour  les depenses  entrainees  par  les  operations  des  Nations Unies  au  Congo;

2. Autorise le  Secretaire general a engager en  1962 des  depenses  ne  depassant  pas  en  moyenne  10  millions de dollars  par mois  pour la continuation des  operations des  Nations U nies  au  Congo ;
3. Decide d'ouvrir un credit de 80 millions de  dollars pour les  operations  des  Nations  Unies  au  Congo  pen› dant la periode du  1er  novembre  1961  au  30 juin 1962;
4. Decide que  le  montant  de  80 millions  de  dollars sera  reparti  entre  Jes  Etats  Membres  en  tant  que
88 Documents  officiels  de  l'Assemblee  genfrale,  sei.rieme  ses› sion,  Annexes, point SS  de  l'ordre du  jour, document  A/C.S/904. 87 Ibid., document  A/S019.
items_en: 1. Decides to maintain the ad hoe account for expenses incurred by United Nations operations in the Congo;
2. Authorizes the Secretary General in 1962 to incur expenditure not exceeding an average of $10 million per month for the continuation of the operations of the United Nations in the Congo;
3. Decides to appropriate a credit of $80 million for United Nations operations in the Congo for the period from 1 November 1961 to 30 June 1962;
4. Decides that the amount of $80 million shall be transferred between Member States as
88 Official Records of the General Assembly, Fifty-second Session, Annexes, agenda item SS, document A/C.S/904. 87 Ibid., document A/S019.

text_fr: depense  de  !'Organisation, sur la base  du  bareme  des quotes-parts  adopte  pour  le  budget  ordinaire 18 , sous reserve des  dispositions du paragraphe 5 ci-dessous, en attendant  l'etablissement d'un bareme  des  quotes-parts different  pour  faire  face  aux  depenses  extraordinaires de  !'Organisation resultant  de  ces  operations;
text_en: expenditure of the Organization, on the basis of the scale of assessments adopted for the regular budget 18 , subject to the provisions of paragraph 5 below, pending the establishment of a scale of assessments in order to meet the extraordinary expenses of the Organization resulting from these operations;

items_fr: 5. Decide de  reduire:
a) De 80 p.  100 la contribution des  Etats Membres dont  la  quote-part  pour  le  budget  ordinaire  est com› prise  entre 0,04 et 0,25  p.  100 inclusivement;

b) De 80 p.  100 la contribution des  Etats Membres qui  ont  r~u en  1961  une  assistance  au  titre  du  Pro› gramme elargi  d'assistance technique  et dont  la  quote› part  pour  le  budget  ordinaire  est  comprise  entre  0,26 et  1,25  p.  100  inclusivement ~

c) De  50 p.  100  la  contribution des  Etats Membres qui  ont  rec;u  en  1961  une  assistance  au  titre  du  Pro› gramme  elargi  d'assistance technique  et  dont  la  quote› part  pour  le  budget  ordinaire  est  egale  ou  superieure a 1,26  p.  100;
6. Prie  instamment les membres permanents du Conseil  de  securite  de verser  des  contributions  supple› mentaires importantes;

7. Fait appel a tous  les  Etats Membres qui  sont  en mesure de  le  faire  pour qu'ils versent des  contributions volontaires  af;in d'aider a faire  face aux  depenses entrainees  par  les  operations  des  Nations  Unies  au Congo;
8. Prie le Gouvernement  de  Ja  Belgique,  Etat directement  interesse a la  situation  dans  la  Republique du  Congo  (Leopoldville),  de  verser  une  contribution substantielle;

9. Decide d'employer  Jes  contributions  supplemen› taires  des  Etats  Membres  visees aux  paragraphes 6, 7 et  8  ci-dessus  pour  compenser  le  deficit  resultant  de !'application des  dispositions  du  paragraphe  5.
items_en: 5. Decision to reduce:
(a) 80 per cent of the contribution of Member States whose regular budget share is between 0.04 and 0.25 per cent inclusive;

(b) 80 per cent of the contribution of Member States which had received assistance under the extended programme of technical assistance in 1961 and whose share of the regular budget was between 0.26 and 1.25 per cent inclusive

(c) 50 per cent of the contribution of Member States which received assistance under the extended programme of technical assistance in 1961 and whose share in the regular budget is equal to or greater than 1.26 per cent;
6. Urges the permanent members of the Security Council to make substantial additional contributions;
7. Appeals to all Member States that are in a position to do so to make voluntary contributions to assist in meeting the costs of United Nations operations in the Congo;
8. Requests the Government of Ja Belgium, a State directly interested in the situation in the Republic of the Congo (Leopoldville), to make a substantial contribution;

9. Decides to use the additional contributions of the Member States referred to in paragraphs 6, 7 and 8 above to compensate for the deficit resulting from the application of the provisions of paragraph 5.

text_fr: 1086· seance pleniere, 20  decembre  1961.
text_en: 1086th Plenary Session, 20 December 1961.

text_fr: 1733  (XVI).  Foree d'urgence dea  Natiou Uniee: previ8iou de depenses relatives a l'entreden de la  Force
text_en: 1733 (XVI). Foree d'émergency dea Natiou Unitediee: provision for expenditure relating to the interdensity of the Force

text_fr: L' Assemblee generale,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Rappelant ses  resolutions  1089  (XI) du 21  decembre 1956,  1151  (XII)  du 22  novembre  1957,  1337  (XIII) du  13  decembre 1958, 1441  (XIV) du 5 decembre 1959 et 1575  (XV) du 20 decembre  1960,
text_en: Recalling its resolutions 1089 (XI) of 21 December 1956, 1151 (XII) of 22 November 1957, 1337 (XIII) of 13 December 1958, 1441 (XIV) of 5 December 1959 and 1575 (XV) of 20 December 1960,

text_fr: Ayant examine le  projet de  budget relatif a la  Force d'urgence des  Nations Unies presente par le  Secretaire general pour l'annee 1962 811 , ainsi  que  les  observations et  recommandations  y  relatives  du  Comite  consultatif pour  les  questions  administratives  et  budgetaires · 0 ,
text_en: Having considered the proposed budget for the United Nations Emergency Force submitted by the Secretary-General for the year 1962, 811 and the observations and recommendations thereon of the Advisory Committee on Administrative and Budgetary Questions,

items_fr: 1. Decide de  maintenir  le  compte  special  pour  les depenses  de  la  Force  d'urgence des  Nations  Unies;

2. Autorise le  Secretaire general a engager en  1962 des  depenses  ne  depassant  pas  en  moyenne  1 625 000 dollars  par  mois  pour  le  maintien  en  fonctions  de  la Force d'urgence des Nations Unies;
3. Decide d'ouvrir  un  credit  de  9 750 000  dollars pour  Jes  operations  de  la  Force  d'urgence des  Nations Unies  pendant  Ja  periode  du  1··  janvier  au  30  juin 1962;

88 Voir  resolution  1691  (XVI)  du  18  decembre  1961. 811 DocufflffltS officiels de f Assemblee  gffltf'al,,  sn.rimu session, Annexes, point 26  de  l'ordre du  jour, document  A/4784. 40 Ibid., document  A/4812.
items_en: 1. Decides to maintain the special account for the expenses of the United Nations Emergency Force;
2. Authorizes the Secretary-General to incur expenditures in 1962 not exceeding an average of $1,625,000 per month for the maintenance of the United Nations Emergency Force;
3. Decides to appropriate a credit of $9,750,000 for the operations of the United Nations Emergency Force for the period from 1 January to 30 June 1962;
88 See resolution 1691 (XVI) of 18 December 1961. 811 Official DocufflffltS of f Assembly gffltf'al, sn.rimu session, Annexes, agenda item 26, document A/4784. 40 Ibid., document A/4812.
